column2: # Religion over time — Protestant vs Catholic vs Jewish vs Other/None
g_protestant <- ggplot(p_protestant, aes(x = period, y = pct, color = party)) +
labs(title = "Protestant", x = "", y = "% of group", color = "") +
g_catholic <- ggplot(p_catholic, aes(x = period, y = pct, color = party)) +
labs(title = "Catholic", x = "", y = "% of group", color = "") +
g_jewish <- ggplot(p_jewish, aes(x = period, y = pct, color = party)) +
labs(title = "Jewish", x = "", y = "% of group", color = "") +
g_other <- ggplot(p_other, aes(x = period, y = pct, color = party)) +
labs(title = "Other / None", x = "", y = "% of group", color = "") +
grid.arrange(g_protestant, g_catholic, g_jewish, g_other, ncol = 2, nrow = 2,
top = grid::textGrob("Party Affiliation by Religion Over Time",
